title: Structured observability — Meridian integration and workflow-level tracing
purpose: Connect beamr's telemetry to Meridian's workflow orchestration. Each workflow execution becomes a trace, with BEAM process execution as child spans. This enables end-to-end observability from workflow dispatch through Gleam execution to step completion.
task: Bridge beamr telemetry to Meridian's workflow tracing context.

requirements.title: Workflow trace context propagation
requirements.spec: When Meridian spawns a BEAM process for a workflow step, propagate the workflow's trace context into the process.
acceptance: MeridianRuntime::run_workflow passes OTel context to the spawned process
BEAM process spans are children of the workflow span
Step execution spans nest under the process span
Test: run workflow, verify trace has workflow → process → function span hierarchy

requirements.title: Workflow-level metrics
requirements.spec: Aggregate process-level metrics into workflow-level summaries.
acceptance: Metrics attributable to specific workflow instances
Test: run workflow, verify workflow-level metrics emitted

boundaries: SHALL NOT implement Meridian-specific span processors — use standard OTel pipeline
SHALL NOT implement workflow replay from traces — that's deterministic replay (B-139-B-143)
verification: cargo test -p beamr passes with all tests green
